---
title: "Data Downloads"
description: "Approved Barbados National Registry public output packages."
page-layout: full
sidebar: false

listing:
  - id: bnr-downloads
    contents:
      - "downloads.yml"
    template: downloads-table.ejs.md
    sort: "updated desc"
    sort-ui:
      - updated
      - briefing_title
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 25
    field-display-names:
      surveillance_area: "Area"
      period: "Period"
      briefing_title: "Output"
      description: "Contents"
      updated: "Updated"
    field-types:
      updated: date
      size_bytes: number
      sort_order: number

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    anchor-sections: true
    link-external-icon: false
    link-external-newwindow: false
---

This page provides public download packages from approved Barbados National Registry surveillance outputs. 

> Each `ZIP` package contains the approved public files for one output. Depending on the briefing, this may include datasets, figures, metadata, an Excel workbook, and a README file. To download individual files, and to download the briefing **PDF** or **Slide-deck**, jump to the relevant briefings page. 

Use the search box to filter by topic, year, surveillance area, or output title.

## Reuse and citation

Please cite the Barbados National Registry when reusing these outputs. Suggested citation:

> *Barbados National Registry. Data and downloads: approved surveillance outputs and public data resources. George Alleyne Chronic Disease Research Centre, The University of the West Indies, Cave Hill Campus. Available from: [page URL]. Accessed [day month year].*

::: {#bnr-downloads}
:::
